footer.tagline: The all-in-one marketplace for film and media production. Locations, crew, props, equipment — all in one place.

cookie.text: This site uses only technically necessary cookies for login and language settings — no tracking or advertising cookies.

home.heroSubtitle: Rent, book and list for free — for film, photo and content. For pros and beginners.

home.step1Desc: No subscription, no fees. Create your profile and start immediately.
home.step2Desc: List a location, book crew or post a job.
home.step3Desc: Direct contact, no agency. Payment via escrow.

locations.heroDesc: Apartments, villas, industrial halls, studios, outdoor areas — across Germany.

creators.heroDesc: Camera operators, directors, actors, makeup artists, content creators — directly bookable, without an agency.

props.heroDesc: From private sellers and rental companies — everything for film, photography and social media production.

about.heroSubtitle: CineGenius connects creatives with locations, crew, equipment and jobs — for film, photography, social media and advertising in the DACH region.
about.missionP1: Anyone who has searched for a location knows the problem: hours of Googling, Instagram DMs, phone chains — and maybe one reply in the end.
about.missionP2: Anyone who wanted to book crew ended up at expensive agencies or happened to know the right people. Renting equipment was a matter of knowledge and trust.
about.missionP3: CineGenius solves exactly that: one place, everything transparent, directly bookable — no agency in between. For film, photo, social media and advertising. For pros and beginners alike.
about.missionPoint1: Locations, crew, equipment and jobs in one place
about.missionPoint2: Direct communication — no agency, no fees
about.missionPoint3: Secure payment via escrow — released after completion
about.missionPoint4: List for free and get found
about.valuesSubtitle: The principles behind every decision we make.
about.value1Desc: Every feature was born from real needs on set, at a shoot or during content production — not from a textbook.
about.value2Desc: Fair chances for everyone involved. Transparent terms protect both providers and seekers.
about.value3Desc: No middlemen, no hidden fees. You contact directly — and get booked directly.
about.value4Desc: Better a few good listings than thousands of mediocre ones. We grow deliberately, slowly and thoroughly.
about.ctaDesc: Whether location owner, freelancer, company or seeker — CineGenius is for everyone who works creatively.

pricing.heroBadge: No subscription. No fees. No commission.
pricing.heroSubtitle: No hidden fees, no commission, no subscription. Register, create your profile and start immediately.
pricing.pillar1Desc: Registration takes 2 minutes. Create profile, post listing — no credit card, no trial.
pricing.pillar2Desc: No commission, no transaction fee. What is agreed stays between provider and buyer.
pricing.pillar3Desc: Verified profiles, direct communication — no agency as middleman.
pricing.categoriesDesc: No difference — the same free usage everywhere.
pricing.faq1A: Yes — completely and without restrictions. Registration, profile, listings, search, messages, bookings — everything free. No commission, no transaction fee, no subscription.
pricing.faq2A: We are currently fully focused on growth and community building. Future monetization (e.g. optional premium features) will be communicated transparently — core features remain free.
pricing.faq3A: No. No commission, no service fee, no platform fee. What you see is the price that provider and buyer agree directly.
pricing.faq4A: Bookings are handled directly between the parties. The payment integration (Stripe) is still in development — until then, settlement is by individual agreement.
pricing.faq5Q: Can I use CineGenius as a company?
pricing.faq5A: Yes. Production companies, rental houses and studios can create profiles and listings for free — without limit.
pricing.ctaDesc: Sign up, create your profile and get started — no risk, no cost.
